channel.title: CVX — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on CVX (Chevron) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED CVX (-18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed CVX in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED CVX (-18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed CVX in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED CVX (+7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added CVX in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)
